metadata.defaultTitle: {brand} — CRM with prospecting, dispatch and automations
metadata.description: Find companies, organize your pipeline and reach out at scale. Prospecting, dispatch agents, extractors and integrations in one place.
metadata.keywords: CRM, prospecting, dispatch, WhatsApp, automation, scraper, leads

hero.title: From prospecting to closing, in a single flow
hero.subtitle: Find companies on Google, qualify them in the pipeline and reach out at scale — WhatsApp and email — with integrations, automation and per-team access control.
hero.note: No credit card to get started.

features.title: Everything your sales operation needs
features.subtitle: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. One place to prospect, organize and convert.

crm.title: CRM & Kanban pipeline
crm.desc: Organize companies, contacts and deals in configurable drag-and-drop pipelines.

prospecting.title: Google prospecting
prospecting.desc: Find companies via the Places API and enrich them with contacts from their own websites, ready to import.

campaigns.title: Campaigns at scale
campaigns.desc: Send WhatsApp and email to segmented lists, with templates and delivery tracking.

connections.title: Integrations & webhooks
connections.desc: Connect WhatsApp (Evolution/Meta), email and automations via webhooks in a few clicks.

access.title: Access control
access.desc: Define profiles (Sales, Legal…) and unlock specific screens for each team member.

insights.title: Dashboard & insights
insights.desc: Track pipeline, conversion and plan usage in a clear, real-time dashboard.

how.title: Get started in minutes
how.subtitle: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

1.title: Create your account
1.desc: Register your organization and invite your team in seconds.

2.title: Connect your channels
2.desc: Plug in WhatsApp, email and your Google key for prospecting.

3.title: Prospect and reach out
3.desc: Find customers, organize the pipeline and engage at scale.

plans.title: Plans for every stage
plans.subtitle: Pick the right plan and change anytime. All include the MétodoAI core.

t1.quote: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore.
t1.author: Ana Martins

t2.quote: Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo.

q1.q: Do I need a credit card to start?
q1.a: No. Create your account and start using the MétodoAI core. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.

q2.a: You connect your own Google Places API key; MétodoAI finds companies and enriches them with public contacts from their websites.

q3.a: Yes, anytime. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

q4.a: Each organization is isolated and sensitive data is encrypted. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.

cta.title: Ready to sell with method?
cta.subtitle: Create your account now and take your sales operation to the next level.

footer.tagline: AI-powered CRM to prospect, organize and close more deals.

prospecting.title: Prospecting
prospecting.subtitle: Find companies via Google Places and enrich them with contacts from their own websites.
prospecting.needConnection: Connect your own Google Places API key to start prospecting.
prospecting.lgpdNotice: Data comes from public sources (Google Places and each company's own website). Results are temporary and removed after 30 days; only what you import enters the CRM. Imported contacts honor opt-out (LGPD/GDPR).
prospecting.empty: No searches yet. Run the first one above.
prospecting.quotaReached: Your plan's lead quota has been reached this month.
prospecting.searchQuotaReached: Your plan's search quota has been reached this month.

error.no_connection: Connect your Google Places key under Connections.
error.quota: Plan lead quota reached this month.
error.search_quota: Plan search quota reached this month.
error.BILLING_DISABLED: Billing is disabled on your Google project. Enable it in the Google Cloud Console.
error.API_KEY_DENIED: The Google key isn't authorized for the Places API. Check the key restrictions.
error.SERVICE_DISABLED: Places API (New) is disabled on this project. Enable it in the Google Cloud Console.
error.INVALID: Invalid query for Google. Adjust the terms.
error.RATE_LIMIT: Google rate limit reached. Try again shortly.
